FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prefiling Order Preventing Filing By Vexatious Litigant
rulings.Rulings: Granted, no opposition having been filed. The moving papers make a sufficient prima facie showing that Mr. Cato and Ms. Mendenhall are vexatious litigants within the meaning of CCP section 391(b)(2). Any Party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing Parties and notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Tuesday, 4/10/12.
